title: Bamboo Cheese Board and Knife Set with Slide-out Cutlery Drawer - Premium Charcuterie Board for Entertaining
content:
Introduction: Elevate your hosting game with the Chic Homeware Bamboo Cheese Board Set. Designed in Xiamen and crafted with precision, this versatile charcuterie board is the ultimate center-piece for wine and cheese nights, parties, or as a thoughtful housewarming gift.   As a dedicated wooden and bamboo homeware manufacturer, we understand that stability is key. Unlike mass-produced boards that crack easily, every board at Chic Homeware undergoes a rigorous quality check. We focus on the details—from the smoothness of the drawer slide to the precision of the knife edges—to ensure your customers receive a product they’ll love for years.

  • Material: 100% Natural  Bamboo

  • Size: 33*33*3.5cm

  • Cutlery: 4-Piece Stainless Steel Knife Set with Ergonomic Bamboo Handles

  • Moisture Content: Strictly controlled to 8%-12% to prevent warping and cracking in different climates.

  • Surface Finish: Food-grade mineral oil for a smooth, safe, and elegant look.
excerpt:
• Sustainable Bamboo Craftsmanship: Made from 100% natural, eco-friendly bamboo. It’s water-resistant, durable, and gentle on your knives.

  • Integrated Cracker Groove: The deep, wide groove around the edges is perfect for holding crackers, bread, nuts, or grapes, keeping your food presentation neat.

  • Odor-Resistant & Easy to Clean: Our high-quality bamboo surface is naturally non-porous and resistant to odors, ensuring a safe and hygienic serving experience.

title: Hand-Carved Leaf Shaped Acacia Wood Serving Tray & Decorative Platter
content:
Product Overview Embrace the beauty of the outdoors with our Botanical Series - Acacia Leaf Trays. Unlike standard rectangular boards, these sculptural pieces double as functional serving ware and artistic home decor. They are a favorite choice for boutique retailers and eco-friendly home brands.

Key Features & Specifications:

  • Three Sizes for Every Need: We offer a complete collection to suit various functionalities, from holding trinkets to serving full appetizers.

    • Small (25cm x 12.5cm x 2cm): Perfect for nuts, candies, or as a jewelry dish/key holder.

    • Middle (38cm x 15cm x 2cm): Ideal size for a cheese platter for two or bread serving.

    • Large (48cm x 18cm x 2cm): A stunning centerpiece for large charcuterie spreads or coffee table styling.

  • Exquisite Craftsmanship (Texture Options):

    • The Carved Edition: Features deep, hand-grooved lines mimicking natural leaf veins. This adds tactile texture and grip, making it a visual standout.

    • The Smooth Edition: showcases the natural, flowing grain of the acacia wood, polished to a silky touch for a minimalist look. (Note: As a factory, we can produce either finish in any size based on your order requirements.)

  • Premium Material: Made from 100% sustainable Acacia Wood (often finished to resemble Black Walnut). It is durable, water-resistant, and less prone to scratching than ceramic trays.

Why Source This From Us?

  • Trend Alert: "Biophilic Design" (nature-inspired home decor) is a top trending search term on Pinterest and Google in 2026.

  • Custom Branding: We can laser engrave your logo on the back or handle.

  • Gift-Ready Packaging: We offer custom color boxes ideal for holiday gifting seasons.
excerpt:
Inspired by nature, this exquisite Leaf Shaped Tray adds an organic touch to any space. Crafted from solid Acacia Wood, it features intricate detailing and a warm, dark walnut finish.

  • Design: Organic Leaf Shape with tapered handle.

  • Texture Options: Available in Smooth or Carved Vein finish.

  • Versatility: Perfect as a charcuterie board, jewelry dish, or entryway organizer.

  • MOQ: 200 sets (Mixed sizes available).

title: Minimalist Rectangular Acacia Wood Serving Tray & Vanity Organizer (Rounded Edge)
content:
Product Overview Designed for the modern home, this Rectangular Acacia Tray bridges the gap between kitchen utility and interior decor. Its elongated shape and smooth, curved edges (often called "pill shape") make it a favorite among Scandinavian and Japandi style retailers.

Why This Tray is a Best-Seller:

  • Versatile Usage Scenarios (Attracts Different Buyers):

    • Dining: The long 46cm version is the perfect Baguette Tray or Sushi Platter. The raised rim ensures food stays in place.

    • Bathroom/Vanity: The 30cm version is widely sourced by hotels and home brands as a Vanity Tray to hold perfumes, soap dispensers, and jewelry, adding warmth to tiled bathrooms.

    • Living Room: Used as a "Catch-all" tray on entry tables for keys and wallets.

  • Premium Quality & Finish: Constructed from sustainable acacia wood, known for its density and resistance to water absorption (crucial for bathroom use). Each tray is sanded to a satin-smooth finish and sealed with food-safe wax oil, highlighting the natural wood grain variation.

  • Production Specifications:

    • Solid Wood Construction: No glue lines on the surface, carved from whole wood for durability.

    • Stackable Design: The flat bottom and uniform shape allow for easy stacking in retail displays or kitchen cabinets.

    • Customization: We offer laser engraving for brand logos and custom color box packaging for retail sets.

title: 3-Tier Rotating Wooden Jewelry Organizer - Multi-Level Desktop Storage Tray for Rings, Bracelets, and Watches
content:
Introduction: Say goodbye to tangled necklaces and misplaced rings. The Chic Homeware 3-Tier Wooden Jewelry Organizer is a masterpiece of functional design, combining the warmth of natural wood with a modern, space-saving structure. Whether on a dressing table or a retail display, this tiered tray adds an air of sophistication to any space.  

Key Features :

  • Space-Optimizing 3-Tier Structure: The vertical design offers three levels of storage without occupying excess desktop real estate. The rotating tiers allow easy access to every compartment.

  • Premium Solid Wood Craftsmanship: Each tray is carved from high-quality wood with a rich, dark finish (Acacia/Walnut style), showcasing unique grain patterns that highlight its "Chic" origin.

  • Soft Felt Lining for Protection: Every compartment is lined with high-quality, anti-scratch felt, ensuring your delicate jewelry, watches, and precious metals stay safe and tarnish-free.

  • Industrial Strength Frame: Supported by a sleek, powder-coated metal frame, this organizer is built for stability and long-term use.

  At Chic Homeware, we don't just sell storage; we sell durability. As a 36-year-old founder working directly with our Cao County factory, I personally oversee the moisture control and sanding processes. We know that the beauty of wood lies in its longevity, which is why every jewelry organizer we export is stress-tested to handle global shipping and varying humidity levels.
excerpt:
• Material: Natural Solid Wood (Acacia/Rubberwood options) + Iron Frame

  • Dimensions: Optimized for standard vanities and nightstands

  • Moisture Content: Strictly kiln-dried to 8%-12% to ensure the trays remain flat and smooth, preventing warping in different climates.

  • Surface Treatment: Hand-polished with a eco-friendly, food-grade lacquer for a silky touch.

title: Premium Oval Acacia Wood Cheese Board with Slate Insert & Juice Groove
content:
Product Overview This versatile Acacia Wood and Slate Serving Board is a must-have for any modern kitchenware collection. The contrast between the warm, golden grain of the acacia and the cool, matte black slate creates a stunning visual appeal, making it a best-seller for holiday gifting and home decor retailers.

Key Features for Retailers:

  • Dual-Surface Functionality: The removable slate insert is not just for looks—it maintains temperature better than wood, making it perfect for serving chilled cheeses or meats. The wooden section features a carved juice groove to catch brine from olives or juice from cut fruits, keeping the table clean.

  • Premium Construction: Unlike bamboo boards that may split, our Acacia hardwood is kiln-dried to a precise moisture content (10-12%) to prevent warping. The surface is finished with food-grade mineral oil, ensuring a smooth, splinter-free touch.

  • Versatile Designs (Collection Available): As a professional manufacturer, we offer this design in multiple shapes based on your market needs:

    • Round with Handle: Classic pizza peel style.

    • Rectangular: For maximizing serving space. (Note: Exact dimensions can be customized to your specifications.)

OEM/ODM Services: We support full customization for global brands:

title: 3-Tier Acacia Wood & Black Metal Dessert Display Stand with Removable Platters

  • Space-Efficient Vertical Design: By utilizing vertical space, this stand allows cafes and buffet lines to display 3x more food without cluttering the table surface. Ideal for compact coffee shop counters or crowded wedding dessert tables.

title: 2 Tier Wooden Dessert Stand Wholesale | Round Bamboo Cupcake Display Tray
content:
2 Tier Wooden Dessert Stand Wholesale

This 2 tier wooden dessert stand is designed for B2B buyers who need a display product that feels natural, clean and easy to merchandise. It offers a simple round tiered structure that works well for cupcakes, pastries, cookies and light snack presentation.

For importers, retailers, brand owners and private label programs, this product sits comfortably between servingware and tabletop display. It is practical enough for daily use, yet presentable enough for gifting, seasonal collections and styled retail displays.

Product Overview

This product can be positioned as a wooden dessert stand, bamboo cupcake stand, tiered serving tray or pastry display stand depending on your market. The two-tier layout creates more display space while keeping the overall structure compact and easy to place on counters or tables.

The natural wood finish gives the stand a warmer and more premium appearance than plastic alternatives. The metal center handle also adds a cleaner visual detail, helping the product feel more giftable and retail-ready.

Why This Product Works for B2B Buyers

B2B buyers usually prefer products that are easy to explain and easy to sell. This stand has a clear use case, which makes it suitable for both online listing pages and physical retail presentation.

It also works across more than one category. It can fit bakery display, afternoon tea serving, party tabletop styling, seasonal home collections and gift-oriented servingware programs.

For private label projects, the structure is simple enough for efficient customization. Size, logo, tray finish, hardware color and packaging can all be adjusted to match different market levels.

Product Information

Product Type: 2 tier wooden dessert stand / bamboo cupcake display tray / tiered serving stand

Main Material: Natural bamboo or wood tray with metal center handle

Structure: Round two-tier display design

Main Use: Cupcakes, pastries, cookies, macarons, snacks and dessert display

Customization: Size, logo, finish, handle color, packaging and selected structure details

Business Type: OEM / ODM / wholesale

Product Highlights

Natural tabletop presentation The wood surface gives the product a softer and more premium appearance. It fits especially well in rustic, bakery, tea, gifting and natural homeware collections.

Clean two-tier structure The double-layer design adds more usable display space without taking up too much table area. That makes it practical for small counters, tabletop serving and styled display sets.

Easy to position across channels This product can be sold as a dessert stand, cupcake display tray, serving stand or decorative tabletop piece. That gives buyers more flexibility in how they build and market the product line.

Suitable for private label development The product has enough visual identity to feel distinctive, while the structure remains easy to customize. It is suitable for logo branding, color box packaging and retail-ready presentation upgrades.

Good for seasonal and gift collections This is the kind of product that fits brunch, tea time, dessert gifting and festive table setups. It works well in both everyday retail programs and seasonal launches.

Ideal For

• Homeware importers and wholesalers

• Bakery and tabletop accessory retailers

• Gift brands and seasonal product collections

• Private label kitchen and servingware programs

• Dessert display and party accessory suppliers

FAQ

Can this wooden dessert stand be customized with our logo? Yes. We can support logo branding through laser engraving, printing or other suitable methods based on your project.

Can the tray size or total height be adjusted? Yes. Tray diameter, total height and selected structure details can be discussed for OEM and ODM orders.

Is this product suitable only for cupcakes? No. It can also be used for pastries, cookies, macarons, snacks and other small tabletop serving items.

Can the metal handle color be customized? Yes. Handle finish and matching hardware details can be adjusted according to your brand style and target market.

Is this suitable for wholesale and private label programs? Yes. This product is designed for B2B business including importers, wholesalers, retailers and brand owners.

Do you support custom packaging? Yes. We can support export carton packing as well as custom retail or gift box packaging according to your project needs.

Looking for a 2 tier wooden dessert stand that fits your retail line, private label collection or wholesale servingware program? Send us your target size, logo idea, handle finish and packaging requirements, and we will help you develop the right version for your market.

title: Custom Bamboo Food Display Platter with Transparent PET Cover
content:
Welcome to our comprehensive guide on the Custom Bamboo Food Display Platter. This unique product is not just a serving tray but an essential addition to your kitchen and dining experiences. Here, we will explore its features, benefits, and various uses, ensuring you understand why this platter is the perfect choice for your culinary presentations.

Our Bamboo Food Display Platter is perfect for serving a variety of foods, including cheeses, meats, fruits, and pastries. The natural bamboo material not only provides a sturdy base but also adds a touch of elegance to your food presentations. Whether you're hosting a party, a picnic, or a family dinner, this platter is versatile enough to meet all your needs.

Moreover, the Bamboo Food Display Platter is not limited to just food. It can also be used as a decorative piece in your home. Consider using it as a base for candles, plants, or other decorative items, showcasing your style and taste.

When it comes to maintenance, the Bamboo Food Display Platter is easy to clean. Simply hand wash it with mild soap and warm water; avoid soaking or placing it in the dishwasher to maintain its finish. With proper care, this platter can last for years, becoming a cherished item in your kitchen.

Additionally, the transparent PET cover included with the platter serves multiple purposes. It keeps food fresh and protected from insects, making it perfect for outdoor events. It also allows guests to see the beautifully arranged food without having to lift the cover, keeping everything neat and inviting.

For those who entertain frequently, the Bamboo Food Display Platter becomes a staple in your kitchen. It is lightweight and easy to transport, allowing you to take it to potlucks, barbecues, or any gathering where you want to impress your guests. Its durability ensures it withstands regular use without losing its charm.

To enhance your experience with the Bamboo Food Display Platter, consider pairing it with complementary serving utensils. Bamboo serving spoons or cheese knives not only match aesthetically but also offer functionality. When preparing a charcuterie board, for instance, include various cheeses, artisanal meats, nuts, and seasonal fruits to create a visually appealing and delicious spread.

One of the standout features of the Bamboo Food Display Platter is its eco-friendliness. Bamboo is a renewable resource, making it a sustainable choice for environmentally-conscious consumers. Additionally, the use of bamboo means that you are opting for a product that is naturally antimicrobial, which helps in maintaining hygiene while serving food.

In conclusion, the Bamboo Food Display Platter is a multifunctional, stylish, and sustainable addition to any kitchen. With its eco-friendly materials and practical design, it not only enhances your culinary presentations but also aligns with a green lifestyle. Make a statement at your next gathering with this elegant platter.

In terms of design, a simple yet elegant style can complement any kitchen décor. For added functionality, consider a foldable cutting board that comes with additional features such as built-in containers or drainage systems for washing fruits and vegetables. Such innovations provide convenience, allowing you to chop and rinse your ingredients all in one place. When choosing a foldable cutting board, consider its versatility and ease of storage. A foldable cutting board can be particularly useful in small kitchens where counter space is at a premium. When laid out on a buffet, it presents a clean and inviting look that can impress your guests. The flip-down front door allows easy access to stored items while keeping them protected from dust and light. The ribbed translucent panel provides subtle visibility without fully exposing the contents, combining functionality with a modern aesthetic.

Ventilated Structure for Freshness

Built-in ventilation holes at the back help regulate airflow inside the bread box. This design reduces excess moisture and helps maintain the freshness of bread for longer periods compared to open storage.

title: Premium Acacia Wood Expandable Cutlery Organizer – Adjustable Kitchen Drawer Insert
content:
Acacia expandable drawer organizer

Upgrade Your Catalog with the "Anti-Warp" Drawer Organizer

Stop selling generic bamboo organizers that crack after three months. Our Premium Acacia Wood Expandable Organizer is engineered for high-end retailers who demand durability and aesthetics.

Designed to fit 99% of standard US and European kitchen drawers, this versatile tray expands from 3 to 5 compartments, offering a tailored solution for silverware, utensils, and office supplies.

Why Source This Organizer From Us?

1. The "Dry Chain" Guarantee (No More Cracking) Unlike standard factories that rush the drying process, we kiln-dry our Acacia wood to a precise 8-12% moisture content. This ensures the product remains stable even when shipped to dry climates like Arizona or heated homes in Northern Europe.

  • See our moisture control process in our blog

2. Premium Material Selection We use only the Heartwood of the Acacia tree, which is naturally water-resistant and harder than oak. We strictly reject sapwood (the white, soft parts) to ensure a uniform, luxury grain pattern that commands a higher retail price. 3. E-Commerce Ready Packaging (Drop-Test Passed) Worried about shipping damage? We’ve optimized the packaging for online sellers.

  • Standard: 3-ply inner box + 5-ply master carton.

  • Upgrade: Reinforced corners for Amazon FBA sellers (ISTA-3A Standard compliant).

4. Certified Food Safe Finished with 100% natural vegetable wax oil. No toxic varnishes. Fully compliant with FDA (US) and LFGB (Germany) standards for food contact safety.

title: Premium High-Gloss Wooden Watch Box Wholesale | Glass Top Display Case with Custom Logo
content:
wooden watch box wholesale

Elevate Your Brand with Our Luxury Wooden Watch Box Wholesale Collection

When it comes to high-end watch packaging, presentation is everything. As a leading custom watch display case supplier, we designed this classic high-gloss wooden watch box to help retailers and watch brands increase their product's perceived value and boost profit margins.

Craftsmanship That Speaks for Itself

Unlike cheap MDF alternatives, this watch display case is built for longevity and elegance.

  • Elegant Finish: The exterior boasts a multi-layer high-gloss piano lacquer finish, giving it a rich, sophisticated mahogany/cherry wood appearance.

  • Clear Display: A scratch-resistant glass top allows collectors to view their timepieces while protecting them from dust and moisture.

  • Premium Hardware: Upgraded gold-tone metal hinges and a secure lock add a touch of vintage luxury while ensuring the lid stays firmly open or safely closed.

  • Plush Interior: Soft, removable velvet pillows securely hold watches of all sizes (from delicate women's watches to heavy men's chronographs) without scratching the bands.

Flexible Customization for B2B Clients

We understand that your packaging is an extension of your brand. We offer comprehensive OEM/ODM services:

  • Logo Application: Add your brand logo via silk-screening, hot stamping, or a custom 3D metal plate on the glass or the wood.

  • Capacity Variations: Mix and match different slot sizes (e.g., 5-slot, 10-slot, 12-slot, or dual-layer 20-slot) within your bulk order.

  • Packaging: Custom color boxes, protective sleeves, and barcode labeling available for direct-to-retail readiness.

Why Partner with Us?

Sourcing bulk luxury watch boxes shouldn't be a headache. We offer low MOQ options for new business partners testing the market, backed by a 100% quality inspection process before shipping. Whether you need 100 pieces for a corporate event or 5,000 pieces for your retail chain, we guarantee stable lead times and competitive factory pricing.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

Q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for this watch box?

A: If you just need the blank boxes without any logo, our MOQ is very flexible—usually starting at just 50 pieces. If you need custom logos or custom packaging, the MOQ is 100 to 200 pieces, depending on the specific customization method. Just shoot us a message with what you have in mind!

Q: Can I mix different sizes (like 6-slot and 12-slot) in one wholesale order?

A: Absolutely. We know retailers need variety. You can mix different capacities in a single order to meet the MOQ, as long as we have the base models in stock.

Q: How do you put my brand logo on the box?

A: The most popular options for this high-gloss finish are gold/silver foil stamping on the inside lid, silk-screen printing on the glass, or applying a custom metal nameplate on the front. Send us your logo file (AI or PDF), and we’ll make a digital mockup for you for free.

Q: What’s the lead time for a bulk order?

A: For standard non-customized stock, we can ship within 5-7 days. For custom orders (with your logo), it usually takes about 15-25 days for production. We always recommend confirming the schedule with us if you have a tight deadline for a product launch or holiday season.

Q: Are the pillows inside large enough for heavy men's watches?

A: Yes. We designed the grid width and the pillows to comfortably fit modern oversized watches (up to 50mm case size) without them touching each other. The pillows are also squishy enough to accommodate smaller women's bands.

Packaging is customized according to buyer requirements.

Because not every customer sells the same way, and packaging should follow the business model, not the other way around.

title: Expandable Bamboo Bath Caddy Tray with Wine Glass Holder & Tablet Stand
content:
The Expandable Bamboo Bath Caddy Tray with Wine Glass Holder & Tablet Stand is a custom-manufactured wooden bath caddy designed and produced by CHIC, a factory-direct wooden products manufacturer in China. It combines the most-requested features in our B2B bath caddy program: extendable arms that fit a wide range of tubs, an integrated wine glass holder, a slide-out tablet and book stand, a soap dish and a slot for a towel — all in a single piece of natural bamboo.

Material & Construction

Solid Moso bamboo with a natural oil finish — dense, water-resistant, naturally antimicrobial and one of the most eco-friendly materials for bathware. Bamboo regenerates in 3–5 years, making this a strong fit for sustainability-positioned brands and retailers.

Key Features

  • Expandable / adjustable arms (70–105 cm)
  • Integrated wine glass holder
  • Slide-out tablet stand / book holder
  • Soap dish / accessory tray

  • Food-grade natural oil finish (FDA / LFGB compliant)
  • Eco-friendly bamboo construction
  • Custom logo engraving available

Fits Which Tubs

This bath caddy tray is suitable for: standard tubs, freestanding tubs, soaking tubs, clawfoot tubs, corner tubs, whirlpool tubs, alcove tubs, jacuzzi. Adjustable arms extend smoothly from 70 cm to 105 cm (27.5" to 41.3") to fit virtually every common tub width sold in the US, UK, EU, AU, JP and KR markets.

OEM & Private Label

CHIC manufactures this expandable bamboo bath caddy on a B2B / wholesale basis — OEM, ODM, and private label programs welcome. Custom logo engraving (laser, hot foil, screen print, UV print), custom finish (natural oil, lacquer, dark stain, distressed), and custom packaging (color box, kraft sleeve, FBA-ready master cartons) are all available. Typical MOQ starts at 300–500 pcs. Sample lead time 7–10 days; mass production 25–35 days after sample approval.

Who This Is For

Built for kitchenware and home-goods brands, Amazon sellers, spa retailers, and hospitality buyers looking for a flagship bamboo bath caddy that handles every use case in a single SKU.
